name: Thailand
intro: Thailand's project demand spans an economy in transition: the Eastern Economic Corridor pulling advanced manufacturing investment, Bangkok's banks funding digital transformation, and a tourism sector rebuilding with new infrastructure. Multinationals with regional operations in Bangkok hire delivery professionals against international standards, and Thai conglomerates increasingly match them — PMP recognition is strong in engineering and construction, while agile credentials grow with the fintech scene. Our live online weekend batch runs on the IST schedule, landing at comfortable mid-morning to evening hours in Thailand. Instruction is in English with an international cohort, useful preparation for the multinational environments most certified roles sit in. Invoices are employer-sponsorship ready. We then support your exam application, provide realistic mock exams, and keep a doubt line open until you pass.

faq.q: How much does certification training cost in Thailand?
faq.a: The course fee is US$1,295 for PMP and US$695 for CSM, covering the full live online weekend workshop, study materials, mock exams and exam application support. PMI's PMP exam fee (US$425 member / US$675 non-member) is paid separately to PMI; the CSM exam is included in the course fee.

faq.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faq.a: Every batch is taught live by an instructor over two weekend days — not pre-recorded videos. You can ask questions in real time, work through exercises with the cohort, and reach the trainer afterwards for doubts.

faq.q: Is the certification recognised by employers in Thailand?
faq.a: Yes. PMP (from PMI) and CSM (from Scrum Alliance) are global credentials recognised identically everywhere, including by employers and recruiters across Thailand.
